Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "level" ; 3 ) & SetProperty ( "server_mode" ; "Preview" ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; FAT Package::Export Package Sub Path ) & SetProperty ( "package_friendly_id" ; FAT Package::JSON Friendly id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type_name" ; FAT Package::Package type name )
IsEmpty (FAT Title::Base project) Or IsEmpty (FAT Package::Local export type)
"View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

StyledText.Data: Instructions This page item is based on block <<FAT Block @ Page item::Name>>. <<FAT Block @ Page item::Description>>

CharacterStyle.Text: This page item is based on block <<FAT Block @ Page item::Name>>. <<FAT Block @ Page item::Description>>

StyledText.Data: Filename: <<Media PI 1::Container original filename>> Last export: <<Media PI 1::Container exported>> Last modification date: <<Media PI 1::Container modified>> Size: <<Media PI 1::Container file size readable>>

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "import_mode" ; "new" ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; FAT Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey )& SetProperty ( "source_item_type" ; FAT Block @ Page item::Name )
SetProperty ( "import_mode" ; "update" ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; FAT Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey )

StyledText.Data: Import media You can import media to this page item using the buttons below.

CharacterStyle.Text: You can import media to this page item using the buttons below.

StyledText.Data: Import and update text You can import text to this page item using the buttons below.

CharacterStyle.Text: You can import text to this page item using the buttons below.

Calculation.Text: TF Page item::Source item type ≠ "page-item" And Case ( FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage ; TF Page item::Localisation code = $$localisation_code ; TF Page item::Localisation code = FAT Title::Original localisation code ) /* Show only imported texts in this view. Not "standard" texts. */

Media Page Item::Source item type ≠ "page-item" And Case ( FAT Title::gViewTranslatedLanguage ; Media Page Item::Localisation code = $$localisation_code ; Media Page Item::Localisation code = FAT Title::Original localisation code ) /* Show only imported Media in this view. Not "standard" texts. */
Media Page Item::Container file extension ≠ "MP3" And Media Page Item::Container file extension ≠ "MP4" And Media Page Item::Container file extension ≠ "MPG"

StyledText.Data: When “yes” is ticked, the video in this block will be played using the browser’s native video player. This will enable features like full-screen.

Calculation.Text: Not PatternCount (List(Media Page Item::Container file extension); "mp4")
SetProperty ( "import_mode" ; "new" ) & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; FAT Package::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "parent_id" ; FAT Page item::PrimaryKey )
notDeveloper Or FAT Block @ Page item::BlockTemplate id= ""
Not PatternCount ( FAT Block @ Page item::Name ; "sprig") Or isTranslator //Import texts to sprig story

StyledText.Data: Created by: <<CreatedBy>>. • <<CreationTimestamp>> |. Last modified by: <<ModifiedBy>> • <<Container modified>>
